description_long: This is a vintage upright arcade game cabinet labeled 'Princess Quest III' on its marquee, with a weathered and rusted exterior that suggests years of use. The front features a large, rectangular screen with a blue-tinted display area, a single joystick, and a button control panel below the screen, as well as a coin slot and access panel. The cabinet is primarily dark brown with reddish undertones and significant wear, including visible scratches and patches of discoloration. The side panels are adorned with faded yellow graphics depicting a running princess, adding a whimsical and nostalgic touch. The back of the cabinet is plain and unadorned, showing only the dark, worn surface. The overall structure is boxy with a slanted upper section housing the screen and marquee, typical of classic arcade machines.
description: A weathered, upright arcade game cabinet labeled 'Princess Quest III' with a blue screen, single joystick, and faded yellow princess graphics on the sides. The cabinet is dark, rusted, and shows significant signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Princess Quest III' marquee, blue screen, control panel with joystick and button, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the faded yellow princess graphic and the cabinet's slanted upper section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark, and worn surface with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring another faded yellow princess graphic, mirroring the left side.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible bezel and blue-tinted display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and one button, both centrally positioned below the screen; no visible color markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Princess Quest III' in white on a dark, weathered background with no additional imagery
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Faded yellow graphic of a running princess on both side panels, with no other patterns or themes
